configHighlights.title: Centralised Brand Config
configHighlights.description: All company details, colors, and SLAs in one file -- no more editing 6 templates for a phone number change.

configHighlights.title: 3-Level Urgency Styling
configHighlights.description: Routine (dark), Urgent (amber headers + 2hr SLA), Emergency (red + 30min SLA) across both customer and business templates.

configHighlights.title: Dark Mode Templates
configHighlights.description: Per-template dark mode color schemes with live preview. Auto-injects @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) CSS for supported email clients.

configHighlights.title: Attachment Configuration
configHighlights.description: Per-template attachment types with MIME validation, file size limits, and auto-generation flags for PDF quotes and agreements.
